root.rep_text: รายงานการถอนหุ้น โอนหุ้น แยกประเภท

approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

committee_date.text: วันที่คณะกรรมการอนุมัติ

root.sql:
SELECT substr(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no),1,100) as member_name, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_doc_no, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_date , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.approve_date , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.trans_type , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.membership_recieve , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.share_withdraw , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no ) as group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name ( pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no ) ) as group_name , '!withdraw_date_1!' as from_date , '!withdraw_date_2!' as to_date , '!committee_date!' as committee_date ,
(select nvl(share_stock,0) from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no and seq_no = ( select max( seq_no ) from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no and operate_date < ( select beginning_of_account from sc_acc_m_account_constant ) ) ) as share_stock ,
(select nvl(share_stock,0) /2 from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no and seq_no = ( select max( seq_no ) from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no and operate_date < ( select beginning_of_account from sc_acc_m_account_constant ) ) ) as half_share_stock ,
REPLACE (( select to_snumber(nvl(share_stock,0) /2) from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no and seq_no = ( select max( seq_no ) from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no and operate_date < ( select beginning_of_account from sc_acc_m_account_constant ) ) ),RIGHT(( select to_snumber(nvl(share_stock,0) /2) from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no and seq_no = ( select max( seq_no ) from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no and operate_date < ( select beginning_of_account from sc_acc_m_account_constant ) ) ),5),'00') as half_share_stock_round
FROM sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det WHERE ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.withdraw_doc_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.trans_type = 'REQ' ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_status = '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.approve_status = '1' ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no = '049898' ORDER BY sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_doc_no
